summary.en: An organizational scenario-planning framework from Thomas J. Chermack that treats scenario work as a project system: prepare, explore, develop, implement, and assess scenarios so they change decisions and organizational learning.
summary.zh: Thomas J. Chermack 提出的组织情景规划框架，把情景工作视为项目系统：准备、探索、开发、实施和评估情景，使其真正改变决策和组织学习。

sources.label: Thomas J. Chermack · Scenario Planning in Organizations: How to Create, Use, and Assess Scenarios · Berrett-Koehler Publishers · 2011

references.label: Thomas J. Chermack · Scenario Planning in Organizations: How to Create, Use, and Assess Scenarios · Berrett-Koehler Publishers
references.pages: Performance-Based Scenario System; Phases 1-5; Managing Scenario Projects; Human Perceptions

note.en: Source for the five-phase performance-based scenario system and the organizational project/assessment layer of scenario planning.
note.zh: 五阶段基于绩效的情景系统，以及情景规划组织项目和评估层的来源。
